description: Receipt issued by Karīm al-Ṭabbākh to Abū l-Ḥasan for a payment of 4 young chickens (farārīj) toward a debt on the date of Sunday, 10 Jumādā I. This Karīm is known to have been active in the operations of the Qodesh ca. 1170 CE based on T-S Ar.29.145 (PGPID 39225).
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
